details: The agent correctly navigated to both URLs. For the first URL (httpbin.org/status/404), it reported the navigation failure error (net::ERR_HTTP_RESPONSE_CODE_FAILURE) accurately. For the second URL (httpbin.org/html), it successfully loaded the page and correctly identified the title 'Herman Melville - Moby-Dick' and described the Moby-Dick excerpt content. Both steps were completed successfully.
